calendar.matters:
Petition Fro Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property [Prob Code Sec 850(A)(3)(B)]
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Natasha Kolb for Renel Tron.

Ms. Kolb presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to a corporate co-trustee. The Courts concern is the intent of the settlor. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
